name: plugin-doctor
description: Standalone marketplace for plugin-doctor — the one-command repair tool for Claude plugins stuck on an old version or failing the in-app directory install (404).

plugins.name: plugin-doctor
plugins.description: Fixes stalled Claude plugin updates. Diagnoses whether a plugin is stuck on an old version or hitting the in-app directory 404, then fixes it: runs the staged, reversible marketplace-updater script for you (or walks the manual fix), with config-safety guarantees — your plugin data and brand config are never touched. One command: /plugin-doctor.
